reviews.review_description: This game very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very fun and they have a great community!!

I have three reasons for this. 1.p2w. They sell speed coils and more for 15$ almost half the lobby always has them. I thought uou couldnt sell stuff in gt copies? 2. The people. Every gt game the people always suck but this ones is horrid. People will sit at the entrance of every map will one person which is usually me goes to get the monster and then when im like 1 mile away and get it the server owner resets it. And the cherry on top is they all love the trash maps none of the good ones 3. Monsters. All the monsters are herrendously slow idk why these people need to buy speed coils save your time and dont buy this game unless youre under 10 years old

reviews.review_title: game is very fun and a good community.
reviews.review_description: When i first played this game, i thought this was just gonna be your average “gorilla tag horror slop game” But i was proven wrong, this game is very fun and has an amazing community and very cool and summons like fearing gorilla, but if you have epilepsy or get scared easily i wouldn’t get the game.

I love this game and I love the concept of summoning entities and the community is really kind and teach you how to do things and play stuff. When I first played my friend showed me and I thought it was just gonna be and gorilla horror game but then when I played I found out it is actually a really good game but if you get scared easily you shouldn’t play this but I recommend you try it

CGH Copy & Pay 2 win stuff (sorta) and slop since it has events. would have been better if it wasnt a cgh copy,  Anyone writing 5 star reviews is either trying to get mod or just has low standards for games and does not know who Hyper is.
